prestazioni: SR20DET (GT-Avenir W11 variant) turbo upgrade to a Garrett GT2860RS-5 with a 0.86 A/R turbine housing and 56 trim compressor wheel, paired with a Tomei 260° camshaft set (260° intake/256° exhaust, 10.8mm lift) and HKS Hi-Power 70mm throttle body for improved airflow and spool characteristics

Custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system by Fujitsubo Giken with a 2.5-inch center section, 70mm dual outlets, and a straight-through design with a single 300-cell GReddy SP2 catalytic converter for optimized backpressure and JDM-compliant emissions

Nismo 555cc/min high-impedance fuel injectors, Walbro 255 lph in-tank fuel pump, and a Sard 60mm fuel pressure regulator, controlled via a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with a custom 3D-mapped ignition and fuel strategy for the SR20DET, including knock control via a Defi Advance BF knock monitor
estetica: Vertex Japan 'Racing' front bumper lip with integrated canards, paired with a custom carbon fiber hood featuring a 30mm vented scoop for the SR20DET intercooler, finished in Nissan 'Super Black' (KH3) with a matte clear coat
Work Emotion CR Kiwami 17x9 +35 wheels with 225/45R17 Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R tires, wrapped in a custom 5-spoke mesh design and powder-coated in 'Gunmetal Grey' (RAL 7021) with polished lips

Rocket Bunny V3 (W11-specific) widebody kit with extended fenders, side skirts, and a duckbill rear spoiler, all fabricated from lightweight fiberglass and reinforced with carbon fiber inner liners, paired with a custom rear diffuser by C-West for improved aerodynamics
